Projects.name: Elmah.io
Projects.description: Meet elmah.io! From development to production, we help you monitoring your website by logging all uncaught errors. Unlike ELMAH, flat files, logging frameworks and similar, all of your errors are indexed and made searchable. Once logged, we will notify you on a channel of your choice (mail, Slack, HipChat etc.). When you get that notification, we provide you with the tools necessary to fix errors fast. Combining answers from social media with a lot of contextual information about the error, will help you fix bugs at supersonic speed.
